zh.Heveningham, Blything, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可維寧加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Heveningham於1324年出生在英國素福爾可維寧加姆時，他的父親Philip Heveningham25歲，母親Maud Jarpenuile ( 2 Children)21歲。他於1365年與Joanne Gyssinge在英國英格蘭諾福爾可利德哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1379年在英國諾福爾可利德哈姆享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Heveningham于1324年出生在英国素福爾可維寧加姆时，他的父亲Philip Heveningham25岁，母亲Maud Jarpenuile ( 2 Children)21岁。他于1365年与Joanne Gyssinge在英国英格兰諾福爾可利德哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1379年在英国諾福爾可利德哈姆享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Heveningham was born in 1324, in Heveningham, Suffolk, England, his father, Philip Heveningham, was 25 and his mother, Maud Jarpenuile ( 2 Children), was 21. He married Joanne Gyssinge in 1365, in Reedham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1379, in Reedham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Heveningham est né en 1324, à Heveningham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Philip Heveningham, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Maud Jarpenuile ( 2 Children), avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joanne Gyssinge en 1365, à Reedham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1379, à Reedham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Heveningham 1324 in Heveningham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip Heveningham 25 und seine Mutter Maud Jarpenuile ( 2 Children) 21. Er hat 1365 in Reedham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Joanne Gyssinge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1379 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Reedham, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Heveningham è nato il nel 1324 nel Heveningham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Philip Heveningham, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Maud Jarpenuile ( 2 Children), aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Joanne Gyssinge nel 1365, nel Reedham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1379, nel Reedham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Heveninghamが1324年にイギリススフォルクヘベニンガムで生まれた時，父Philip Heveninghamは25歳，母Maud Jarpenuile ( 2 Children)は21歳であった。1365年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクレエドハムでJoanne Gyssingeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1379年にイギリスノーフォルクレエドハムで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Heveningham(이)가 1324년 영국 수폴크 헤베닝함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip Heveningham(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Jarpenuile ( 2 Children)(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1365년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 리드함에서 Joanne Gyssinge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1379년 영국 노르폴크 리드함에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Heveningham nasceu em 1324, em Heveningham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip Heveningham, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Maud Jarpenuile ( 2 Children), tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanne Gyssinge em 1365, em Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1379, em Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Heveningham родился в 1324 г. в местности хивенингхам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Philip Heveningham было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Jarpenuile ( 2 Children), 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanne Gyssinge в 1365 г. в местности ридхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1379 г. в местности ридхам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Heveningham nació en 1324, en Heveningham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Philip Heveningham, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Maud Jarpenuile ( 2 Children), tenía 21 años. Se casó con Joanne Gyssinge en 1365, en Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1379, en Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
